name: The lawn
description:
Amazing!  The view from here is breathtaking!  As you peer over the overlook,
you unconsciously grab a nearby tree branch to reassure yourself that you are
still on the lawn.  The lawn breaks before you to form an overlook of a great
expanse of Mallorn trees.  Thousands of them are before you, all in gold and
green.  Birds soar through the forest.  From this view, however, they look the
size of ants.
